tasks.title:
Correct Temporal worker restart guidance and tests

TDD intent: inline
Delegation hint: inline_required
Touched files:
- plugin/src/tools/temporal-ops.ts
- plugin/src/tools/change.ts
- docs/temporal-recovery.md
- plugin/src/tools/temporal-ops.test.ts
- plugin/src/tools/change.test.ts

Scope:
- Update five tool-code guidance sites:
  1. plugin/src/tools/temporal-ops.ts recommendTemporalRecovery search-attribute unverified branch
  2. plugin/src/tools/temporal-ops.ts recommendTemporalRecovery worker-not-alive branch
  3. plugin/src/tools/temporal-ops.ts recommendPostRegistrationAction
  4. plugin/src/tools/temporal-ops.ts adv_temporal_worker_restart description
  5. plugin/src/tools/change.ts ARCHIVE_SEARCH_ATTRIBUTE_RECOVERY_HINT
- Update docs/temporal-recovery.md with bounded reload-path guidance.
- Update tests that assert guidance text.

Red phase:
- First update/add tests so current source fails because guidance lacks the required reload-path caveats.
- Run: pnpm test -- src/tools/temporal-ops.test.ts src/tools/change.test.ts

Green phase:
- Implement wording updates only; do not change restart runtime behavior.
- Keep short recovery hints concise for OpenCode agents; put full caveat in tool description/docs.
- Run targeted tests green.
- Run pnpm run check before checkpoint.

Scenarios:
- Given an agent reads adv_temporal_worker_restart description, when it needs reload guidance, then the description distinguishes OpenCode-loaded tool modules from Temporal worker code and names the correct reload actions.
- Given search-attribute recovery guidance recommends worker restart, when an agent follows it, then it understands worker restart does not reload plugin tool code.
- Given worker source under plugin/src/temporal changes, when guidance describes restart, then it says to run pnpm run build:worker before adv_temporal_worker_restart.
- Given issue #20 is implemented locally, when final report is emitted, then the issue is not auto-closed before landing and evidence is reported.
tasks.implementation_summary: Updated Temporal worker restart guidance in temporal-ops tool descriptions/recovery hints, archive recovery hint, and temporal recovery docs. Added/updated tests to lock reload-path caveats. Verification: red targeted test failed on new assertions; green targeted test passed; pnpm run check passed after formatting. Checkpoint commit: ff09c60.

error_recovery.last_error: adv_task_checkpoint ledger recording failed after successful commit ff09c60: Workflow Update failed
error_recovery.next_strategy: Proceed with task completion using recorded task evidence and git checkpoint; note ledger recording issue for follow-up.

attempts.error: adv_task_checkpoint returned checkpointRecorded:false after commit ff09c60
attempts.diagnosis: Git checkpoint succeeded but ledger workflow update failed; Temporal diagnose shows worker/project/change reachable, likely task-run ledger binding/update issue rather than git issue.
attempts.fix_tried: Retried adv_task_checkpoint with clean HEAD ff09c60; ledger recording still failed.

attempts.error: adv_task_run_status with explicit target_path showed no ledger; default target showed stale red_recorded ledger from initial environmental red
attempts.diagnosis: ADV ledger state split between target_path/current-session views; task state itself has red/green evidence and checkpoint commit exists.
attempts.fix_tried: Re-recorded green task evidence against current session; duplicate ignored because task evidence already recorded. Temporal diagnose healthy.

tasks.completed_by: Completed. TDD evidence recorded in task.tdd_evidence; task-run ledger checkpoint recording failed after commit and retry, but git checkpoint exists at ff09c60 and Temporal diagnose was healthy. This appears to be a ledger-recording/tooling issue, not implementation failure.

wisdom.content: Fresh ADV worktrees may lack gitignored `plugin/node_modules`; targeted pnpm tests can fail with `vitest: not found`. Symlinking to the main checkout's existing node_modules restored test execution without changing package deps. Also, `adv_run_test` has a 30s timeout that can reject green evidence for targeted suites that complete in ~32s; record fallback evidence with command/output when needed.

adv_task_checkpoint can successfully commit while failing task-run ledger recording with `Workflow Update failed`. If default vs target_path task-run views diverge, record remediation in task error_recovery and verify git/task evidence before proceeding; this may indicate a ledger binding/tooling gap rather than implementation failure.

proposal.notes: User approved proposal with `continue`; B/F/S scan had no critical findings (Coverage: B:C F:C S:C).

discovery.notes: Discovery findings persisted; user approved acceptance criteria with `approve`; agreement.md captured objectives, AC, constraints, decisions, and no deferred questions.

design.notes: Design recorded. Validator verdict: CAUTION only; cautions are implementation-planning details for prep, no conflict or contract-compromise risk. Straightforward guidance-only design, no user-value tradeoff pause required.

planning.notes: User approved prep vision with `approve`. Task graph ready: 1 inline TDD task, validation passed with NO_DELTAS advisory only.

execution.notes: Execution verified from completed task tk-6ef68ab0-8b1a-4ba7-92aa-1d16bac292cd. TDD evidence recorded, targeted tests passed, pnpm run check passed, full pnpm test passed, pnpm run build passed, and checkpoint commit ff09c60 exists. Ledger checkpoint recording had a tooling failure after successful git commit and is documented in task error_recovery.

acceptance.notes: User replied `accept` after acceptance summary. Review found no blockers, issues, or suggestions. Verification passed: pnpm run check; pnpm test -- src/tools/temporal-ops.test.ts src/tools/change.test.ts.

release.notes: User replied `sign off`. Harden status READY: no blockers/high findings after remediation. Verification passed: pnpm run check, targeted tests, pnpm run build; merge dry-run clean; conformance state empty so external conformance skipped.

clarify_findings.message: Scope section is empty or placeholder. What specific files/modules will change?
